articles.title: Market Bottom? Cardano ($ADA) Trading Volume, Active Addresses and Social Dominance Reach 2023 Highs as Price Falls
articles.description: The price of the smart contract platform Cardano ($ADA) has recently fallen to a $0.23 low after the cryptocurrency was said to be a security in lawsuits filed by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) against leading exchanges Binance and Coinbase, while some of its metrics rose to yearly highs. articles.title: Fed Leaves Policy on Hold, Ending Long String of Rate Hikes
articles.description: The U.S. central bank signaled it might restart rate hikes in coming months if inflation doesn't continue to recede.

articles.description: The last 24 hours have been highly significant for the American crypto industry, as Bitcoinist previewed. And the outcome couldn’t have been much better for the industry, with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) taking some beating. Most eagerly awaited were the Hinman documents in the legal battle between Ripple Labs and the SEC […]

articles.title: Ripple’s Alderoty calls for probe into Bill Hinman and his infamous speech
articles.description: Stuart Alderoty is joined by a number of other high-profile individuals calling for an investigation into the former Securities and Exchange Commission official.
